title: Rain should extinguish campfires
body:
![Rain should extinguish campfires banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XFk4dAJX/images/ec0aa45093b888daafeedba17270be4cf8e238f7.png)

# What is it about?
This mod causes campfires to extinguish when it's raining, if they are located outside a building.

It's literally just that.

# Config
The mod is fully configurable.
**[Click here for the Configuration Guide](https://github.com/restonic4/Rain-should-extinguish-campfires/blob/master/CONFIG.MD)**

# Modpacks
Feel free to use it in your modpacks, no problem with that, have fun! Feel free to suggest changes as well.
